calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF GCFS, INC., MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied. Triable issue of fact raised whether defendant opened an account with plaintiff's assignor. (Declaration of Kevin Tan.)(Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-10-2009 Continued To Jul-15-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF GCFS, INC., MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to July 15, 2009. All parties to provide courtesy copies to Department 302 with cover letter reflecting new date. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

DEFENDANT KEVIN TAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600. (302/PJM)
